title: dysoxylum rubrocostatum
intro: Dysoxylum rubrocostatum is a species of plant in the family Meliaceae, commonly known as the red-costate dysoxylum or red-costate meliaceous tree. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Dysoxylum rubrocostatum include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate headaches and body aches, and even exhibit anticancer properties. Dysoxylum rubrocostatum is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions with other medications.
